text:
Spring 2024 Workshop Calendar

Mon 9:00 AM — Intro to Python (Room 101)
Tue 2:00 PM — Data Visualization (Room 204)
Wed 10:00 AM — Machine Learning Basics (Room 305)

Workshop Description: Machine Learning Basics covers supervised and unsupervised learning, train-test splits, cross-validation, and common evaluation metrics with hands-on scikit-learn exercises.
